title: bromus × eburonensis
intro: Bromus × eburonensis, also known as the Eburon meadow brome, is a hybrid species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus × eburonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Bromus × eburonensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its essential oil has been used in aromatherapy for its calming and relaxing properties.
